spec.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_id) AS "Unique Visitors", COUNT(*) AS "Page Views" FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_id) AS value FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

SELECT COALESCE(country, 'Unknown') AS country, country_code, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_id) AS visitors, COUNT(*) AS page_views, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_bounce = true) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS bounce_rate FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY country, country_code ORDER BY visitors DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT COALESCE(city, 'Unknown') AS city, COALESCE(region, '') AS region, COALESCE(country, '') AS country, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_id) AS visitors FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND city IS NOT NULL GROUP BY city, region, country ORDER BY visitors DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT COALESCE(isp, 'Unknown') AS isp, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_id) AS visitors FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY isp ORDER BY visitors DESC LIMIT 15
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COALESCE(device_type, 'unknown') AS device_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY device_type ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT COALESCE(browser, 'Unknown') AS browser, COUNT(*) AS count FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY browser ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COALESCE(os, 'Unknown') AS os, COUNT(*) AS count FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY os ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COALESCE(connection_type, 'unknown') AS connection_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY connection_type ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_bounce = true) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS value FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY lcp_ms) AS "LCP P75" FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND lcp_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY fcp_ms) AS "FCP P75", PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ttfb_ms) AS "TTFB P75" FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND fcp_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cls_score) AS "CLS P75" FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND cls_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT AVG(time_on_page_ms) AS value FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND time_on_page_ms IS NOT NULL AND time_on_page_ms > 0

SELECT COALESCE(utm_source, 'direct') AS source, COALESCE(utm_medium, '(none)') AS medium, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_id) AS visitors, COUNT(*) AS page_views, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_bounce = true) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS bounce_rate FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY utm_source, utm_medium ORDER BY visitors DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT COALESCE(utm_campaign, '(none)') AS campaign, COALESCE(utm_source, 'direct') AS source, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_id) AS visitors FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND utm_campaign IS NOT NULL GROUP BY utm_campaign, utm_source ORDER BY visitors DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT AVG(scroll_depth_pct) AS value FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND scroll_depth_pct IS NOT NULL
SELECT AVG(load_time_ms) AS value FROM visitor_sessions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND load_time_ms IS NOT NULL AND load_time_ms > 0

spec.title: 4T Shop — Visitor Analytics
spec.description: Visitor analytics dashboard for 4T Shop. Tracks unique visitors, page views, session duration, and top pages. Powered by PostgreSQL.
